title: Badge
description: Displays a badge or a component that looks like a badge.

manual.title: Install dependencies
manual.description: Install the required dependencies for the badge component.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

manual.title: Copy the component code
manual.description: Create a new file and paste the badge component code.

examples.title: Variant
examples.description: Use the variant prop to change the variant of the badge.

examples.title: With Icon
examples.description: You can render an icon inside the badge. Use data-icon="inline-start" to render the icon on the left and data-icon="inline-end" to render the icon on the right.

examples.title: Spinner
examples.description: You can render a spinner inside the badge. Remember to add the data-icon="inline-start" or data-icon="inline-end" prop to the spinner.

examples.title: Link
examples.description: Use the asChild prop to render a link as a badge.

examples.title: Customs Colors
examples.description: You can customize the colors of a badge by adding custom classes such as bg-green-50 dark:bg-green-800 to the Badge component.
examples.code:
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; export function BadgeCustomColors() { return (
Blue Green Sky Purple Red
); }
